description: Complete overhaul of SEIDO's testing infrastructure: delete stale files, reorganize directory structure, fix cross-platform scripts, implement Page Object Models, fix all E2E smoke tests, add unit tests for utility functions, add data-testid attributes, and align documentation. All tests run against real staging DB (no mocks).

userStories.title: Delete stale files and clean test artifacts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want stale test files removed so that the codebase only contains active, functional test infrastructure.
acceptanceCriteria: tests-new/ directory is deleted entirely (stale Playwright tests with no Playwright dep)
Old debug screenshots in tests/e2e/screenshots/ are deleted (keep .gitkeep only)
No orphaned test configs or dead imports remain
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Deleted tests-new/ (stale Playwright), cleaned 8 debug screenshots, verified no dead imports

userStories.title: Reorganize test directory structure with shared fixtures
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a clean, centralized test directory structure so that all test types (E2E, unit) share common fixtures and utilities.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/fixtures/test-accounts.ts exists (moved from tests/e2e/fixtures/)
tests/fixtures/known-entities.ts exists with known building/lot/intervention IDs from staging DB
tests/e2e/pages/ directory exists for Page Object Models
tests/unit/ directory exists for unit tests
E2E helpers import from correct new paths
E2E config and tests still run without errors
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created tests/fixtures/ with shared test-accounts.ts + known-entities.ts. Old fixture re-exports for backwards compat. Created tests/e2e/pages/ and tests/unit/ dirs.

userStories.title: Install cross-env and fix Windows test scripts
userStories.description: As a developer on Windows, I want test scripts to work cross-platform so that headed mode and preview mode env vars propagate correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: cross-env is installed as devDependency
test:e2e:headed script uses cross-env instead of cmd /c
test:e2e:preview script uses cross-env instead of cmd /c
Both scripts run correctly on Windows
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: cross-env@10.1.0 installed, both scripts updated to cross-platform format

userStories.title: Extract cookie helper and create test utilities
userStories.description: As a test author, I want shared utilities (cookie banner dismissal, wait-for-content helpers) extracted into reusable modules so that every E2E test doesn't duplicate this logic.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/helpers/cookies.ts exists with dismissCookieBanner() function
dismissCookieBanner is removed from smoke.e2e.ts inline and imported instead
A waitForContent() helper exists in selectors.ts that accepts text markers and timeout
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created cookies.ts helper, added waitForContent() to selectors.ts, refactored smoke.e2e.ts to use both + KNOWN_ENTITIES for routes/markers

userStories.title: Create Page Object Models for login and dashboard
userStories.description: As a test author, I want Page Object Models encapsulating login page and dashboard page selectors/actions so that E2E tests are maintainable and DRY.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/pages/login.page.ts exists with selectors (#email, #password, submit) and login() action
tests/e2e/pages/dashboard.page.ts exists with sidebar, topbar, nav selectors
smoke.e2e.ts refactored to use POMs instead of inline selectors
Auth helper refactored to use LoginPage POM
All existing smoke tests still pass
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created LoginPage POM with loginAs(), DashboardPage POM with isLoaded(). Auth helper now delegates to LoginPage. Smoke tests refactored. Full pass verification deferred to US-006.

userStories.title: Fix all 5 smoke tests passing reliably
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all 5 smoke tests to pass reliably against localhost:3000 so that the E2E foundation is solid before writing more complex tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Test 1 (login page loads) passes
Test 2 (login as gestionnaire) passes
Test 3 (dashboard display) passes
Test 4 (building creation page) passes — handles skeleton loading with appropriate timeout/warm-up
Test 5 (lot creation page) passes
All 5 pass in 3 consecutive runs (no flakiness)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Wrong content markers in known-entities.ts — 'nouvel immeuble' → 'ajouter un immeuble' to match actual page title. (2) Removed redundant page.evaluate() assertions that raced with Next.js streaming re-renders. All 5 tests pass in 3 consecutive runs (~15s each). Zero flakiness.

userStories.title: Add data-testid attributes to critical UI elements
userStories.description: As a test author, I want data-testid attributes on key interactive elements so that E2E selectors are stable across CSS/design changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Login form elements have data-testid (email-input, password-input, login-submit)
Sidebar navigation links have data-testid
Building wizard steps have data-testid (step-1, step-2, etc.)
Lot wizard steps have data-testid
Common form elements (save button, cancel button, next/prev) have data-testid
No visual or functional regressions from adding attributes
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added data-testid to: login form (3 attrs), step-progress-header (dynamic step-item-N), building wizard footer (prev/next/submit), lot wizard footer (prev/next/submit), sidebar nav links (dynamic sidebar-nav-{segment}). 6 files modified.

userStories.title: E2E test: Building creation wizard (5-step flow)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a full E2E test that navigates the 5-step building creation wizard to validate the flow end-to-end against real staging data.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/building-creation.e2e.ts exists
Page Object Model tests/e2e/pages/building-wizard.page.ts exists
Test navigates all 5 steps (Info > Lots > Documents > Interventions > Confirmation)
Each step validates key content markers are visible
Test uses data-testid selectors where available
Test passes against localhost:3000
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: 7 tests: step 1 load, address fill (Google Maps autocomplete → manual fallback), steps 2-5 navigation, back navigation. Uses native value setter for React controlled inputs. Step detection via Next button text (unique per step). 2 consecutive green runs.

userStories.title: E2E test: Lot creation wizard
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a full E2E test for the lot creation wizard to validate the independent lot creation flow.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/lot-creation.e2e.ts exists
Page Object Model tests/e2e/pages/lot-wizard.page.ts exists
Test navigates lot creation steps
Test uses data-testid selectors where available
Test passes against localhost:3000
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Do NOT submit the form — just validate navigation through steps

userStories.title: Unit tests for utility functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests covering core utility functions (date formatting, validation, transforms) so that refactoring doesn't break business logic.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 15 unit tests across lib/ utility functions
Tests cover date formatting/calculation utilities
Tests cover validation helpers (email, phone, etc.)
Tests cover data transform functions
All tests pass via npm test
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: 51 unit tests across 3 files: vat-validator (19), quote-status (24), intervention-location (8). All pass. 4 pre-existing failures in thread-welcome-messages + notification-dispatcher (stale expectations, not caused by our changes). vitest.config.ts updated to include tests/unit/ and exclude tests/e2e/.

userStories.title: Consolidate vitest configs and align documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want test configs consolidated and documentation aligned so that the testing infrastructure is self-documented and coherent.
acceptanceCriteria: Root vitest.config.ts includes tests/unit/ in its include patterns
docs/testing/QA/11-donnees-test.md references match tests/fixtures/test-accounts.ts
TESTING-AUDIT.md updated with final state after cleanup
CLAUDE.md test commands section is accurate
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: TESTING-AUDIT.md Section 10 added with full implementation status. CLAUDE.md updated: Playwright ref replaced with Puppeteer + vitest commands. vitest.config.ts already updated in US-010.
